creator: byrnejb@harte-lyne.ca
text:
FreeBSD vhost01.hamilton.harte-lyne.ca 12.4-RELEASE-p1 FreeBSD 12.4-RELEASE-p1 GENERIC  amd64


nvidia0: <GeForce GT 730> on vgapci0

[root@vhost01 ~ (master)]# nvidia-settings

--> Select Graphics Information

Program halts and displays:

ERROR: Local version of NVML doesn't implement this function

The program 'nvidia-settings' received an X Window System error.
This probably reflects a bug in the program.
The error was 'BadWindow (invalid Window parameter)'.
  (Details: serial 984 error_code 3 request_code 155 minor_code 4)
  (Note to programmers: normally, X errors are reported asynchronously;
   that is, you will receive the error a while after causing it.
   To debug your program, run it with the --sync command line
   option to change this behavior. You can then get a meaningful
   backtrace from your debugger if you break on the gdk_x_error() function.)
